authority_shape: Highest authority for filings, judgments, consent decrees, and procedural posture when records are official and public.
access_shape: Public court databases, judgment portals, tribunal repositories, or official DOJ/agency-linked docket materials.
reuse_shape: Respect access limits; no scraping behind logins, paywalls, sealed, or private attachments.
case_type_shape: Litigation, injunctions, complaints, decrees, judgments, and review of automated/public AI decisions.
saturation_shape: 1 DOJ-linked indictment PDF remains image-only with partial caption OCR plus 1 EEOC filing/settlement pair exposing Civil Action No. 1:22-cv-02565 in agency summaries, but there is still no open court-originating complaint, decree, docket entry, or judicial order text.

authority_shape: Medium-to-high authority for what a public body disclosed or procured; weak for deployment impact, legality, or efficacy unless corroborated.
access_shape: Official registers, procurement portals, tender notices, award pages, contract pages, and public-body project pages.
reuse_shape: Metadata-first extraction; do not infer deployment, legality, or AI capability beyond source text.
scope_shape: Often local-language first. / Country, regional, and municipal public-sector jurisdictions.
cadence_shape: Periodic / batch releases varying by portal.
case_type_shape: Algorithm registers, procurement anomalies, AI system disclosures, and public deployment surfaces.
saturation_shape: 2 municipal public AI register rows still anchor the family, but the bounded non-register side now also includes 1 Slovenian police-plus-CORDIS official companion pair, 2 UK regulator-document packages, 1 Danish Datatilsynet governance row plus 2 exact-row Retsinformation legal-basis companions and 1 official UFSN taskforce-report companion, 1 Helsinki same-buyer procurement companion, and Amsterdam's explicit same-buyer Azure/Public Cloud family bridge; buyer-side/public-impact proof is still missing.

authority_shape: Variable authority; strongest when tied to CERTs, established labs, coordinated disclosure, or peer-reviewed work.
access_shape: Public blogs, conference papers, CERT notes, vendor advisories, and coordinated-disclosure pages.
reuse_shape: Preserve bounded metadata and defensive lessons only; exclude exploit payloads and dangerous reproduction detail.
scope_shape: Mostly English with some multilingual advisories. / Global.
case_type_shape: Prompt injection, exfiltration, model inversion, unsafe agent tooling, red-team findings, and coordinated disclosures.
saturation_shape: 11-row live security package now sits at 3 core / 8 appendix / 1 gap with the explicit supply-chain/plugin zero state retired; the trust-boundary slice remains a bounded three-row surface (ToolHive, Playwright MCP/deployment, and one seeded non-MCP PraisonAI row), while 1 explicit peer-reviewed gap row still remains and required-brief plus claim-routing helper consumers now inherit that live split.

authority_shape: Medium-to-high authority for retractions, correction notices, benchmark-integrity notes, and scholarly dispute records depending on source.
access_shape: Public journal notices, publisher pages, DOI registries, retraction databases, and institutional reports.
reuse_shape: Public/citation-ready sources preferred; preserve publisher-specific reuse terms.
scope_shape: Mostly English with some multilingual notices. / Global scholarly ecosystem.
case_type_shape: Retracted AI papers, benchmark contamination, fabricated evaluation claims, and research-integrity anomalies.
saturation_shape: 7 locally classified rows now split into 5 evidence-depth classes: three direct publisher-originating notice-text exemplars across archive-resolved NEJM plus two Springer surfaces, one archived residual platform-action exemplar tied to an exact SSRN/arXiv pair, one mediated SAGE row, and two still-weak specialist/discovery rows.

authority_shape: Secondary conceptual authority for harm framing and related-work comparison, but not machine-ready incident evidence.
access_shape: Public Georgetown CSET article surface plus exact public PDF/README anchors captured in local bridge work.
reuse_shape: Use citation/manual mapping only; no explicit open machine-reuse grant or row-level public dataset route was verified locally.
case_type_shape: Harm framing, interpretive taxonomy support, and related-work positioning.

paper_readiness_interpretation: Strong for appendix-only harm-posture interpretation and related-work positioning; invalid as event evi... [truncated]

authority_shape: High authority for official actions, allegations, orders, fines, guidance, and procedural posture within issuing jurisdiction.
access_shape: Official regulator portals, enforcement pages, press releases, decisions, and linked official documents.
reuse_shape: Public-document use only; preserve original-language nuance and narrow posture-based wording.
scope_shape: Multilingual depending on regulator. / Jurisdiction-specific; collectively global.
case_type_shape: Enforcement actions, deceptive-marketing cases, privacy breaches, official warnings, and procedural escalations.
saturation_shape: 11-row shared authoritative core now counts 8 direct-document-grade rows across Italy, the United States, the United Kingdom, and promoted FTC non-finance official rows, while the court-family blocker remains tracked separately under sf08.

authority_shape: Secondary corroborative authority valuable for discovery, local context, and timeline stitching, but weaker than official sources.
access_shape: Public news sites, investigative outlets, archives, and broadcaster pages.
reuse_shape: Use quotations sparingly; preserve outlet/date/URL and do not treat visibility as prevalence.
scope_shape: Multilingual, including underrepresented and local-language reporting. / Global.
case_type_shape: Discovery leads, local context, public reactions, timeline stitching, and cases absent from English summaries.
saturation_shape: 6 local leads across Finland, Lithuania, Slovenia, and Estonia; 1 lead already upgraded from media/discovery friction to a direct official source.
paper_readiness_interpretation: Strong for discovery, coverage-gap analysis, and rare-language methods;... [truncated]

authority_shape: High structured authority for adversarial-ML and agentic-security techniques, mitigations, and case-study relations.
access_shape: Public website plus Apache-licensed GitHub YAML/data distribution.
reuse_shape: Apache-2.0 lowers reuse friction for technique/mitigation/case-study metadata; do not overstate case studies as exhaustive incident coverage.
case_type_shape: Adversarial techniques, mitigations, case-study relations, and agentic/security anomaly structure.
saturation_shape: Fresh bounded live check still returns public distributed ATLAS YAML; the deprecation banner remains visible and `version: 5.6.0` still appears, so structured reuse stays valid but version status must travel with citations.

authority_shape: High structured technical authority for public AI vulnerability/report metadata when exact IDs and references are preserved.
access_shape: Public website plus openly downloadable GitHub raw JSON and repository contents.
reuse_shape: MIT-licensed structured metadata lowers reuse friction, but import should stay bounded to IDs, dates, metrics, references, and linked report/vulnerability objects.
case_type_shape: AI vulnerabilities, security edge cases, technical misuse, and failure reports.
saturation_shape: Fresh bounded live check still returns public raw report JSON with stable AVID report ID/date fields; permissive structured metadata posture remains intact.

authority_shape: Secondary but important structured authority for risk and harm definitions; not an incident-truth source.
reuse_shape: Use as attributed taxonomy/definition layer only; verified Google Sheets workbook export allows bounded structured tab/slice reuse, but mirror-specific access and row-level event equivalence claims remain out of scope.

authority_shape: Primary only for what the issuer disclosed; self-interested and incomplete for broader truth claims.
access_shape: Public status pages, transparency reports, release notes, product incident notes, GitHub advisories/issues.
reuse_shape: Public notices only; no private support content or hidden dashboards.
scope_shape: Mostly English with some localized notices. / Global firm/platform scope.

paper_readiness_interpretation: Strong for overlap, residual-gap detection, and source-baseline discussion; weak alone for legal/compliance or incident-trut... [truncated]

authority_shape: Low authority alone; discovery surface only until independently corroborated.
access_shape: Public posts, forums, community trackers, screenshots, issue threads, and public discussion surfaces.
